desc: The even-number filter includes unnecessary n != 0 and n > -9999 checks that obscure its actual purpose and arbitrarily reject valid even integers below the threshold.
The pipeline performs multiple full passes and allocates a new list at every transformation, causing avoidable time and memory overhead.
step7_redundant_summary manually iterates to count elements instead of using len(), adding needless complexity and preventing use with iterables that lack repeated traversal guarantees.
step6_print_all checks startswith("VAL") rather than the generated "VAL_" prefix, so malformed values such as "VALUE" are treated as valid output.
